Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}I thought about talking to my mom, but I don't want to worry her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11472 0 0}It's just... ever since that money went missing, I've been feeling anxious whenever I'm alone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11471 0 0}S-Sorry... I know it was a selfish request...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}I feel a bit better now that I got to see you, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about her today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11443 0 0}{f 5 13 9 30 109}I'm sorry. I was trying not to depend on you too much since you've already done so much for me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 1 25 25}But hearing you say that does make me feel a lot better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11450 0 0}I'll keep trying to think about what I can do about the missing money...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}But while we're together here, let's talk about happier things.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We chatted for a while longer before[n]I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
